title: 565+ Minecraft Emoji
description: Over 565 Emojis that are Minecraft themed.
body:
To insert an emoji into the game, you need to copy the ? in the square located on the opposite of the emoji picture that you would like to use

In order for the emoji on the plate to be highlighted, you need to paint them white![In order for the emoji on the plate to be highlighted, you need to paint them white](https://i.imgur.com/XX8sFam.png)

To use the emojis refer to this [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vQolaFZJ3PnMXBW0uWbtLiyDIsCAq0uYRlDrBmPQrVG-IJpH8bV5csIxggiceE2tmqP6w0uT-YmIty9/pub) and paste the  next to it in Minecraft to use it.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/155f8a6a646ed5b45f89b5386fe6c824837ffdf5.png)


# Here is the Catalogue
![Steve and Alex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f940d5a0234e65cb7d4f7d243ae75880f75fef3.jpeg)![More Steve and ALex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86040ec83f4d4a6b5a2959b1a6cb08e54919dfd.jpeg)![Even more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1afe6b3c7994d5d0bb6a059472305bd5374a03.jpeg)![Last of them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac5207cb4026980cced06f56d2fdcf3a6d035f16.jpeg)![Villagers and other mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ec25ed779fb9aebcdf173bafd638da2fe246e94.jpeg)![miore mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe51ca7a79b4456a4b41ed0bdb02dd233c8aa2ea.jpeg)![even more mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6604e74ade560f9428c9307b066ccfe963d47a6a.jpeg)![even more more mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66730b5c15a79399eba6c803a14f12be388034a8.jpeg)![last of mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f933260535ed017287206b47653e088f6032d3e6.jpeg)![and then spinoff mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbfff7ed8c60f8ba3c85ed56b70812b02039aa42.jpeg)![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/817ad72dc8eccc347fc33cb1193863a52cb2d642.jpeg)![more blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d442cda14162d780a15528283fda886e793e0363.jpeg)![just a tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eccf04d3a0d37a34029823dd8fc087d0000993b1.jpeg)![thne finally items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c072de49d9255fe908d4a2da952f2e217cc0e01.jpeg)


MIkaG has ceased to create his wonderful mods, I am going to be updating this pack to work not only on the original version but future versions. I don't want his work to go to waste and would love for it to work again. Miss you MIkaG!
